task_completion.description: Record an active condition for Heavy Metal Toxicity using an ICD-10 T56 code for John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing John Zenon's patient record (or the Diseases/Conditions module) with a new active condition added that includes the ICD-10 code prefix 'T56' (e.g., T56.3 for Cadmium).

task_completion.description: Order at least one baseline laboratory test for John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a laboratory test order (such as a Toxicology screen, Complete Blood Count, or Comprehensive Metabolic Panel) created for the patient John Zenon.

task_completion.description: Create a clinical evaluation for John Zenon containing the specific exposure phrase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a clinical evaluation form for John Zenon with the exact phrase 'Cadmium well water exposure' visible in the chief complaint or clinical notes fields.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client being actively used to navigate, search, and enter data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL scripts to insert the data directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running psql commands, python scripts, or other backend database manipulation tools.

integrity.description: The agent entered the required information into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text such as 'Cadmium well water exposure' and the 'T56' codes should be visible inside the actual GNU Health form fields, not just typed into a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient 1's exact name in the system is 'John Zenon' and Patient 2's exact name is 'Matt Zenon Betz'. The required ICD-10 prefix for the condition is 'T56' (T56.3 specifically covers Cadmium). You must verify exactly 1 lab order per patient. For John Zenon's clinical evaluation, the exact phrase 'Cadmium well water exposure' must be present for full points.
